SEARCH
Package cpdt.common.utils

Class TelemetrySerializer

java.lang.Object
cpdt.common.utils.TelemetrySerializer
public final class TelemetrySerializer extends Object
Utility class responsible for serializing TelemetryPacket objects into JSON strings or byte arrays, and deserializing JSON strings or byte arrays back into TelemetryPacket objects.

This class provides a centralized interface for JSON conversion operations used by both the simulator and backend modules, ensuring a consistent serialization format throughout the application.

The utility is thread-safe because ObjectMapper is designed for concurrent use after configuration.

This is a utility class and cannot be instantiated.

Since:
1.0
Author:
Lakshmi Sanjeev

    Modifier and Type

    static <T> T
    fromJson(byte[] payload, Class<T> clazz)
    Deserializes a JSON byte array into an instance of the specified class.
    static <T> T

    Deserializes a JSON string into an instance of the specified class.
    static byte[]

    Serializes the specified object into its JSON byte array representation.

    toJsonString(Object object)
    Serializes the specified object into its JSON string representation.

  • Method Details

    • toJson

      public static byte[] toJson(Object object)
      Serializes the specified object into its JSON byte array representation.

      This method converts any Jackson-serializable object into UTF-8 encoded JSON bytes suitable for transmission over network protocols such as MQTT or for binary storage.

      Parameters:
      object - the object to serialize
      Returns:
      the serialized JSON as a byte array
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the object cannot be serialized

    • toJsonString

      public static String toJsonString(Object object)
      Serializes the specified object into its JSON string representation.

      The resulting JSON string may be used for logging, debugging, storage, or transmission to components expecting textual JSON.

      Parameters:
      object - the object to serialize
      Returns:
      the serialized JSON string
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the object cannot be serialized

    • fromJson

      public static <T> T fromJson(byte[] payload, Class<T> clazz)
      Deserializes a JSON byte array into an instance of the specified class.

      The supplied byte array must contain valid JSON representing an object compatible with the requested target class.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of object to be returned
      Parameters:
      payload - the JSON byte array to deserialize
      clazz - the target class of the resulting object
      Returns:
      the deserialized object
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the JSON cannot be deserialized into the requested type

    • fromJson

      public static <T> T fromJson(String json, Class<T> clazz)
      Deserializes a JSON string into an instance of the specified class.

      The supplied JSON string must represent an object compatible with the requested target class.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of object to be returned
      Parameters:
      json - the JSON string to deserialize
      clazz - the target class of the resulting object
      Returns:
      the deserialized object
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the JSON cannot be deserialized into the requested type
